title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 84.880 - Holidays — no salary deduction
text:
84.880.  Holidays — no salary deduction. — No deduction shall be made from the salary of any police officer on account of the aforesaid holidays.
(RSMo 1939 § 7586) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7443; 1919 § 8851; 1909 § 9700
